name: @radzor/web-scraper
description: Web page scraping with CSS selector extraction, pagination support, and rate limiting. Fetches HTML content and extracts structured data using selectors.

inputs.name: rateLimit
inputs.description: Minimum delay between requests in milliseconds.

outputs.name: scrapeResult
outputs.description: Extracted data with selected elements and raw HTML.

events.name: onPageFetched
events.description: Fired when a page is fetched.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on fetch or parse errors.

actions.name: scrape

params.name: selectors
params.description: Named CSS selectors to extract (e.g. { title: 'h1', prices: '.price' }).

actions.description: Fetch a page and extract data using CSS selectors.

actions.name: fetchHtml
actions.description: Fetch raw HTML content from a URL.

llm.constraints: Respects robots.txt conventions. Use responsibly — excessive scraping may violate ToS. Server-side only.
